titleStmt.title: SII 16.57: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 57. (A.R. No. 474 of 1919.) LITTLE KĀÑCHĪPURAM, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the rock in the Aruḷāḷa-perumāḷ temple.
This is dated Śaka 1438, Dhātri, Pushya ba. 7, Wednesday, corresponding to 1517 A.D., January 14.

States that the king, having conquered Udayagiri, captured Ravutarāya-mahāpātra, and having taken the hill fortresses of Addaṅki, Vinikoṇḍa, Bellaṁkoṇḍa, Taṅgēḍa, Kētavaram, etc., captured alive Virabhadrarāya, son of Pratāparudra-Gajapatirāya, Naraharidēva, son of Kumāra Haṁvira and others, performed tulāpurusha at Amarēśvara in Dharaṇikōṭa, returned to Vijayanagara and started out again on a campaign of conquest towards Kaliṅga, reached Bējavāḍa, conquered Koṇḍapalli, captured Praharāju Śiraśchandra-mahāpātra, Bōḍajana-Mahāpātra, Bijilikhānu and others, took at a stretch all the fortresses of Telaṅgāṇya such as Anantagiri, Uṇḍrakoṇḍa, Urlugoṇḍa, Aruvapalli, Jallipalli, Kandikoṇḍa, Kappaluvāyi, Nallagoṇḍḷa, Kaṁbhaṁmeṭṭu, Kanakagiri, Śaṁkkaragiri, etc., installed the Jayastaṁbha at Siṁhādri-Poṭnūru and performed the mahādāna there, returned to Rājamahēndra and desiring to have the mahādānas performed by his queens Chinnādēvi and Tirumaladēvi, returned to Vijayanagara and having visited, on the above date, with his queens, god Varadarāju at Vishṇu Kāñchi, and paid one thousand varāhas as kāṇike, had the puṇyakōṭi-vimāna of the god gilded with gold and granted the villages Vershāru, Tiruppālukaḍalu, Gōvindachēri, Nūṟappandāṅgal and Peḷūru yielding altogether annually 1,500 varāhas, to meet the expenses for the fortnightly puḻukkāppu service and daily offerings to the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ śubhamastu . svasti śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara mūrurāyaragaṁḍḍa Arirāya vibhāḍa Aṣṭadikkurāyamanōbhayaṁkkara bhāṣagetappuvarāyaragaṁḍḍa pūrvadakṣiṇapaści masamudrādhīśvara yavanarājyasthāpanācārya gajapativibhāḍa śrīvīrapratāpa śrī vīra kṛṣṇadēva mahārāyalu vijayanagarāsanuṁḍḍi pūrvadigvijayayātrakuviccēśi Udaya giridurgamaṁnu sādhiṁcci ravutarāyamahāpātruniṁ baṭṭukoni . Addaṁkki . vinikoṁḍḍa . bellaṁkoṁḍḍa . nāgārjanikoṁḍḍa . taṁgēḍa . kētavaraṁ . mōdalayina giridurggasdhaladurggālu Ēkadhāṭini kaikoni koṁḍḍavīṭidurggaṁmīda viḍiśi laggalu paṭṭiṁcci Ā durggaṁ puccukoni . patāparudragajapatirāyala komāruṁḍu vīrabhadra rāyaṁḍu . komārahaṁvīrapātruni koḍuku naraharidēvu . rācūri mallūkhānuṁḍu . Uddaṁḍḍakhānuṁḍu . janyāla kasava pātruṁḍu pūsapāṭi rācirāju . śrīnātharāju lakṣmipatirāju . paścima bālacaṁdra mahāpātraṁḍu . vīru mōdalayina pātrasāmaṁtulānu maṁnevāri niṁni jīvagrāhaṁgānu paṭṭukoni vāriki Abhayadānaṁ yicci dharaṇikōṭa Amarēśvarānanu tulāpuruṣa mahādāna muṁnu śāya navadhariṁcci tirigi vijayanagarānakuviccēśi sāmrājyaṁ cēsuṁnu mariṁni kaḷiṁggadēśa digvijayārddhamai bejavāḍaku viccēśi koṁḍḍapallidurggamuṁnu sādhiṁcci Ā durggaṁmīṁdanuṁna . vraharāju śiraścaṁdra mahāpātruṁḍu . bōḍajana mahāpātruṁḍu . bijilikhānuṁḍu .
vīru mōdalayinavārini jīvagrāhaṁgānu paṭṭukoni vāriki Abhayadānaṁ yicci . Anaṁtagiri . Uṁḍrakoṁḍḍa . Urllugoṁḍḍa . Aruvapalli . jallipalli . kaṁddikoṁḍa . kappaluvāyi . nallagoṁḍla . kaṁbhaṁmeṭṭu . kanakagiri . śaṁkkaragiri . yivi mōdalayina teluṁgāṁṇyapu durggālu Ēkadhāṭini kaikoni siṁhādri poṭnūriki viccēśi Akkaḍanu jayastaṁbhaṁ vēśi mahādānamuṁnu śāyanavadhariṁcci tirigi rājamahēṁdrāvarānaku viccēśi tama dēvuślu ciṁnādēvaṁma tirumaladēvaṁmaṁgāri cātanu mahādānālu cēyiṁ cca navadhariṁcci vijayanagarānaku viccēśi . svastiśrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1438 Agunēṭi dhāta saṁvatsara puṣya bahuḷa 7 budhavāraṁ nāṁḍu viṣṇukaṁcciki viccēśi varadarāja dēvuni darśiṁcci dēvuniki kānike ga 1000 varahālu samarpiṁcci dēvuni puṁṇyakōṭivimānānaku paiṁḍipūyiṁcci dēvuniki samarpiṁcina grāmālu . verṣāru . tiruppālukeḍalu . gōviṁddacēri . nūṟappaṁdāṁgalu . kūḍi yī nālugu grāmāluṁnu ga 1100 varahālu paḷūru grāmaṁ 1 ki ga 400 varahā lu Ubhayaṁ grāmālu 5 ki ga 1500 varahālu yiṁduku dēvuniki padihēnudinālaku vokamāṭu puḷukāpu chātē Aṁduku ga 40 varahālu lke Ēṁḍu 1 ki ga 960 varahālu . Avasarānaku dinaṁ 1 ki paḷyālu 30 ni dīpālu 50 ṭi lekhānu Ēṁḍu 1 ki ga 540 varahālu kūḍi ga 1500 varahāla grāmāluṁnu samarpiṁci yī śāva Ācaṁdrārkasthāyigānu naḍavavalenani yiccina dharmaśāsanaṁ . yī Avasaraṁ viṭṭavan viḷukkāḍuku kaligina yeḍuṁnarapaḷyamunnu Appapaḍiṁni śaṭhagōpajiyyaṁgāri maṭhānaku śiṣyaparaṁparagānu vaiṣṇavula prasāpāṭuku pāliṁ stimi .
Digital edition of SII 16.57 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
